description: Poster on a dark navy mottled background. The headline at top reads, in small white caps, 'ICE local and state law enforcement' above a large white serif title 'PARTNER PROGRAMS.' Down the left side are three rounded thumbnail photos, each tinted a different color: a red-tinted image of hands gripping jail bars; a blue-tinted image of an officer in a 'POLICE' vest; a desaturated image of a hand signing a document. To the right of each thumbnail is a bold serif subhead with body text: 'Jail Enforcement Model - ID and process removable aliens you arrest with active or pending criminal charges.'; 'Task Force Model - Allows your officers to enforce limited immigration authority in certain situations.'; 'Warrant Service Officer - Serve and carry out administrative warrants against illegal aliens.' Bottom left has the circular DHS seal with 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'; bottom right reads 'ICE.gov/287g' in white serif.
notable_text: ICE local and state law enforcement PARTNER PROGRAMS; Jail Enforcement Model; Task Force Model; Warrant Service Officer; ICE.gov/287g
